label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which present Eve ends up with after all those swaps. Hmm, there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me jot down the initial assignments first to keep track. Initial presents: - Alice: Green - Bob: Purple - Claire: Blue - Dave: Black - Eve: Red Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap one by one and track the presents. First swap: Dave and Claire swap. So Dave originally has the black ball, and Claire has the blue present. After swapping, Dave now has the blue present, and Claire has the black ball. Let me update that. After first swap (Dave & Claire): - Dave: Blue - Claire: Black Second swap: Bob and Alice swap. Bob has purple, Alice has green. After swapping, Bob gets green and Alice gets purple. After second swap (Bob & Alice): - Bob: Green - Alice: Purple Third swap: Eve and Bob swap. Eve has red, Bob has green. So now Eve gets green, Bob gets red. After third swap (Eve & Bob): - Eve: Green - Bob: Red Fourth swap: Bob and Dave swap. Bob has red, Dave has blue. After swapping, Bob gets blue and Dave gets red. After fourth swap (Bob & Dave): - Bob: Blue - Dave: Red Fifth
